title: eriogonum effusum subsp. salicinum
intro: Eriogonum effusum subsp. salicinum, also known as Desert Buckwheat, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Eriogonum effusum subsp. salicinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical application, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
